WITH toIntervalNanosecond(15) AS interval_nano SELECT date + interval_nano FROM test_interval JOIN nested_test ON value = 100;
CREATE TABLE complex_test (date DateTime, delta Float64);
SELECT date + toIntervalNanosecond(CAST(delta AS UInt64) * 1000) FROM complex_test WHERE delta > 10;
CREATE TABLE join_test (id UInt32, date DateTime);
INSERT INTO join_test VALUES (1, toDateTime('2024-06-15')), (2, toDateTime('2024-06-16'));
WITH (SELECT SUM(id) FROM join_test) AS total_id SELECT date + toIntervalNanosecond(total_id * 100) FROM join_test;
SELECT value + toIntervalNanosecond(CAST(value * 1E9 AS UInt64)) FROM float_test;
SELECT toDateTime('2024-06-15') + toIntervalNanosecond(CAST(nano_str AS UInt64)) FROM string_test;
